queries.question: What engineering firm(s) are located at the intersection of Elm Street and Pine Avenue, and which civil engineers work there?
queries.sql: SELECT Civil_Engineer, Engineering_Firm FROM CivilEngineers WHERE Intersection = 'Elm St & Pine Ave';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?civil_engineer ?engineering_firm WHERE {
  ?civilengineers a :CivilEngineers .
  ?civilengineers p:Civil_Engineer ?civil_engineer .
  ?civilengineers p:Engineering_Firm ?engineering_firm .
  ?civilengineers p:Intersection ?intersection_f .
  FILTER(?intersection_f = "Elm St & Pine Ave")
}

queries.question: Which civil engineer(s) work at the intersection of Elm Street and Pine Avenue?
queries.sql: SELECT Civil_Engineer FROM CivilEngineers WHERE Intersection = 'Elm St & Pine Ave';
queries.sparql:

SELECT ?civil_engineer WHERE {
  ?civilengineers a :CivilEngineers .

  ?civilengineers p:Intersection ?intersection_f .
  FILTER(?intersection_f = "Elm St & Pine Ave")

queries.question: Which engineering firm has the biggest budget?
queries.sql: SELECT Engineering_Firm FROM CivilEngineers ORDER BY Budget DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?engineering_firm WHERE {
  ?civilengineers a :CivilEngineers .
  ?civilengineers p:Engineering_Firm ?engineering_firm .
  ?civilengineers p:Budget ?budget_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?budget_o)
LIMIT 1
